summary: Create structured migration plan for eliminating filesystem directory references from 89 agent/skill/command files based on WINT-7010 analysis

artifact_outputs.description: Structured migration plan with batch groupings, migration order, compatibility shim strategy, and per-agent remediation steps

acceptance_criteria.description: Pre-condition gate — verify WINT-7010 analysis artifact exists
kb_read_artifact returns non-null artifact with schema_version field
Artifact contains batch_schedule array with required fields per batch
All 89 files from WINT-7010 assigned to exactly one batch
Shared includes batch listed first with no dependencies
Each batch has grep-based negative assertions + human review gate for Batch-0
All five reference categories enumerated with remediation actions
